title: Notify handlers for service side effects
description: Trigger restarts and reloads through handlers that fire only when the changing task reports changed.
body: Use when a configuration change must restart or reload a service. Do not restart the service in a separate unconditional task — it then bounces the service on every run even when nothing changed. Actions: have the config task notify a handler, and define the handler to perform the restart; handlers run once at the end only if a notifying task reported changed. Validation signals include the handler firing only on runs where the config actually changed. Risk boundary: handlers do not run if the play fails before the flush — for critical restarts, consider meta: flush_handlers or escalate on partial convergence.
